TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_ťėŅšľäŚä™śóŹ_Aynu_binacadan, title = ťėŅšľäŚä™śóŹ_Aynu_binacadan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/ťėŅšľäŚä™śóŹ_Aynu_binacadan} }

S.FORM: Aynu binacadan " Aynu", amisan Dipun nu , timul nutipan nu E'luose a yuncumin binacadan, u Yaynu tademaw, Aynu tademaw, Aynu tademaw", tada aenengan nuheni i Paihaytaw, Ku'yedaw, Cendaw subal atu Kancaciw nu kitidaan. itini i Aynu nakamuan " Aynu" u " tademaw" han aimian, nina binacadan nikakenihan a kitidaan pangangan han Aynu-mawsi-li, nakamuan nu Ayun han " aenengan nu tademaw han". ". katukuh ayda, mangalay ku katuud nu Aynu a tademaw pangangan tu nuheni u " „ā¶„āŅ„É™" " nu Dipun a ngiha': Utari, kamu nu Aynu " cabay" a imian. Ťá≥šĽä, :Utari, ). i cudad nu siahu, "Aynu" atu "Utali" idaw ku tusaay nuheni a nganganan. milecad tu tademaw atu binacada, tatengaay a Aynu nu binacadan malawpes tu. . sausian nu siahu, tademaw makaala tu tulim-sepsepsep, caay kaw nu sihu ni sausian nu tademaw makaala tu tusa a bataan nu mangan. maka caywal-siwsiw mihcaan tulu a bulat tusa a demiad nipatinakuan " peahaydaw malumanay a nidiputan" nikudan, Aynu pacician minanam tu kamu nu Dipun, awnu Dipun ku ngangan, pasaluimengen ku lisin nu siza, mala niyaduay tu a tademaw. . nikalepacawan tu sakatusa a nikudan, sihuan nu Dipun hidan tu nuhini micukaymas " tawyaay a tademaw" hida satu mukamu, caay palutatengaen tina idaw nu binacadan sa. katukuh tu tusep-sepwal mihcaan enem a bulat enem a dimiad tawya ku Dipun palutatengan tuni ka idaw nu Aynu u yuncumin, tusep-caysiw mihcaan sepat a bulad caysiw demiad tawya tu siwantan. šļĆśąįŚĺĆ, . sakamusa ku Peahaydaw sihu pikinsaan nu cudadan itini i cay-siw-wal-sip a mihcaan, tawya Peahaydaw idaw ku tu-sip-lu-wal-cay a mangan nu Aynu tademaw. nika, katuuday nu Aynu a tademaw culimeken nuheni ku binacadan nuheni, atu caay kaw katinengan tu udip a tatapangan, sisa ayda hantu utiih a sausian ku tatengaay nu tademawan nu Aynu. E'luo-se tikuo itini i cay-wal-siw-pic mihcaan pikinsaan tu tademaw, idaw ku cay-sip-sip-nem a tademawan itida i E'luo-se musakamuay tu Aynu a nakamuan, itini i Ku'yedaw idaw ku cay-sip-lu-sip a tademawan. 1,434šļļ. picedekan atu zenla'sia kapulunga mikikiw kibetulay a sulit Aynu a tademaw "The Racial History of Man" "cay-siw-tu-lu mihcaan" Luolan. Puoleyci.Dkecen misulitay.ťėŅšľäŚä™šļļ"The Racial History of Man "(1923ŚĻī),ÁĺÖŤė≠¬∑šľĮťõ∑Ś•á¬∑ÁčĄŚÖčťĀúŤĎó. picidekan nu Aynu a tademaw lumeni' ku banges, apuyu' ku dais yadah ku ngisngis, ilabu ku mata, tanestes ku cihek, kapah ku udip, macebet ku bukes, kalalukutlukutan, wayway mahida u Kawsiwsuo a tademaw, bihit atu banuh nu udip kalasumasumanahan ku tademaw, katinengan nu kitakiday a tademaw sacebetay nu yadahay a banuhbanuhan nu tademaw. . Aynu a tademaw itini i likisaay a misulitay, micu misulitay atu mililiday misulitay kacinglawan nuheni. ayda hantu, mikinkiway a tademaw tulu ku sapatahekal tu Aynu nu tu lingatu a sasasuwalan. . nipikinkiwan ayda, ina misulitay a tademaw nai' henay ku wantan tunuhenian namakacuwaay hakiya sa. caysiw a seci cunci Ikuo zenlea siacia sipakayda i hekal nu waywayan patucek sa tunuhenian u Oluopa a daydayan kunuheni sa. namakayda i Sipuoliya makayda i Ku'yedaw katukuh i Dipun subalan. . nu aydaay a ciyenhetan-hesuan nipikinkiwan nai' maadih atu Oluopa tademaw nu sakalecad a milaliday " nuheni idaw atu Cuncu, Antaman nu sakalecad a lalidan", ayda nu lisenti masacacaya a bayan nipikinkiwan maadih ku Aynu tademaw " pasu namakaydaay i peahaytaw atu tunpea kitidaan a aadihan" maala ku N9b a talakaw nu tatengilan, itini i Sipuoliya walian a Udekay tademaw idaw kuni ka adihan, misasengi tu Tunya tademaw hina adih i Ocuo. śĒúŚł∂N9b . idaw henay ku duma a sasakamuen tada tapang nu Aynu tademaw u peasan a Taypinyung nadaw a tademaw, sakatulu a nakamuan u kuyasiya tademaw. (Proto-Caucasoid). tu-sep-tu-cay mihcaan idaw kunipalutatenaan tuni kinkiwan, peahadaw Senwen a tademaw u Oya talu amisan nu tucu a tademawan " malumanay a zitayan nu hedekan nu tademaw "Terminal Upper-Paleolithic people" atu kunyun nu ayawan caylim-sepsepsep mihcaan namaka itiniay a kitakidan katukuh nu senwen zen anikapulungan. 2021 "(Terminal Upper-Paleolithic people) .
S.PHON: ajnu bina ¶adan " ajnu", amisan dipun nu , timur~…ĺ nutipan nu …ô Ē~ °r~…ĺuos…ô a jun ¶umin bina ¶adan, u jajnu tad…ômaw, ajnu tad…ômaw, ajnu tad…ômaw", tada a…ôn…ôŇčan nuńß…ôni i paińßajtaw, ku Ē~ °j…ôdaw, ¶…ôndaw subar~…ĺ atu kan ¶a ¶iw nu kitidaan. itini i ajnu nakamuan " ajnu" u " tad…ômaw" ńßan aimian, nina bina ¶adan nikak…ônińßan a kitidaan paŇčaŇčan ńßan ajnu-mawsi-r~…ĺi, nakamuan nu ajun ńßan " a…ôn…ôŇčan nu tad…ômaw ńßan". ". katukuńß ajda, maŇčar~…ĺaj ku katuud nu ajnu a tad…ômaw paŇčaŇčan tu nuńß…ôni u " ***" " nu dipun a Ňčińßa Ē~ °: utari, kamu nu ajnu " ¶abaj" a imian. **, :utari, ). i ¶udad nu siańßu, "ajnu" atu "utar~…ĺi" idaw ku tusaaj nuńß…ôni a ŇčaŇčanan. mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tad…ômaw atu bina ¶ada, tat…ôŇčaaj a ajnu nu bina ¶adan mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu. . sausian nu siańßu, tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺim-s…ôps…ôps…ôp, ¶aaj kaw nu sińßu ni sausian nu tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a bataan nu maŇčan. maka ¶ajwar~…ĺ-siwsiw mińß ¶aan tur~…ĺu a bur~…ĺat tusa a d…ômiad nipatinakuan " p…ôańßajdaw mar~…ĺumanaj a nidiputan" nikudan, ajnu pa ¶i ¶ian minanam tu kamu nu dipun, awnu dipun ku ŇčaŇčan, pasar~…ĺuim…ôŇč…ôn ku r~…ĺisin nu siza, mar~…ĺa nijaduaj tu a tad…ômaw. . nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tu sakatusa a nikudan, sińßuan nu dipun ńßidan tu nuńßini mi ¶ukajmas " tawjaaj a tad…ômaw" ńßida satu mukamu, ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇča…ôn tina idaw nu bina ¶adan sa. katukuńß tu tus…ôp-s…ôpwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺat …ôn…ôm a dimiad tawja ku dipun par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tuni ka idaw nu ajnu u jun ¶umin, tus…ôp- ¶ajsiw mińß ¶aan s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad ¶ajsiw d…ômiad tawja tu siwantan. ***, . sakamusa ku p…ôańßajdaw sińßu pikinsaan nu ¶udadan itini i ¶aj-siw-war~…ĺ-sip a mińß ¶aan, tawja p…ôańßajdaw idaw ku tu-sip-r~…ĺu-war~…ĺ- ¶aj a maŇčan nu ajnu tad…ômaw. nika, katuudaj nu ajnu a tad…ômaw ¶ur~…ĺim…ôk…ôn nuńß…ôni ku bina ¶adan nuńß…ôni, atu ¶aaj kaw katin…ôŇčan tu udip a tatapaŇčan, sisa ajda ńßantu utiińß a sausian ku tat…ôŇčaaj nu tad…ômawan nu ajnu. …ô Ē~ °r~…ĺuo-s…ô tikuo itini i ¶aj-war~…ĺ-siw-pi ¶ mińß ¶aan pikinsaan tu tad…ômaw, idaw ku ¶aj-sip-sip-n…ôm a tad…ômawan itida i …ô Ē~ °r~…ĺuo-s…ô musakamuaj tu ajnu a nakamuan, itini i ku Ē~ °j…ôdaw idaw ku ¶aj-sip-r~…ĺu-sip a tad…ômawan. *,****. pi ¶…ôd…ôkan atu z…ônr~…ĺa Ē~ °sia kapur~…ĺuŇča mikikiw kib…ôtur~…ĺaj a sur~…ĺit ajnu a tad…ômaw "tńß…ô *a ¶iar~…ĺ ńßistorj of man" " ¶aj-siw-tu-r~…ĺu mińß ¶aan" r~…ĺuor~…ĺan. puor~…ĺ…ô ¶i.dk…ô ¶…ôn misur~…ĺitaj.****"tńß…ô *a ¶iar~…ĺ ńßistorj of man "(*****),***********. pi ¶id…ôkan nu ajnu a tad…ômaw r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° ku baŇč…ôs, apuju Ē~ ° ku dais jadańß ku ŇčisŇčis, ir~…ĺabu ku mata, tan…ôst…ôs ku ¶ińß…ôk, kapańß ku udip, ma ¶…ôb…ôt ku buk…ôs, kar~…ĺar~…ĺukutr~…ĺukutan, wajwaj mańßida u kawsiwsuo a tad…ômaw, bińßit atu banuńß nu udip kar~…ĺasumasumanańßan ku tad…ômaw, katin…ôŇčan nu kitakidaj a tad…ômaw sa ¶…ôb…ôtaj nu jadańßaj a banuńßbanuńßan nu tad…ômaw. . ajnu a tad…ômaw itini i r~…ĺikisaaj a misur~…ĺitaj, mi ¶u misur~…ĺitaj atu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj misur~…ĺitaj ka ¶iŇčr~…ĺawan nuńß…ôni. ajda ńßantu, mikinkiwaj a tad…ômaw tur~…ĺu ku sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ajnu nu tu r~…ĺiŇčatu a sasasuwar~…ĺan. . nipikinkiwan ajda, ina misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku wantan tunuńß…ônian namaka ¶uwaaj ńßakija sa. ¶ajsiw a s…ô ¶i ¶un ¶i ikuo z…ônr~…ĺ…ôa sia ¶ia sipakajda i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu wajwajan patu ¶…ôk sa tunuńß…ônian u or~…ĺuopa a dajdajan kunuńß…ôni sa. namakajda i sipuor~…ĺija makajda i ku Ē~ °j…ôdaw katukuńß i dipun subar~…ĺan. . nu ajdaaj a ¶ij…ônńß…ôtan-ńß…ôsuan nipikinkiwan nai Ē~ ° maadińß atu or~…ĺuopa tad…ômaw nu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mir~…ĺar~…ĺidaj " nuńß…ôni idaw atu ¶un ¶u, antaman nu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a r~…ĺar~…ĺidan", ajda nu r~…ĺis…ônti masa ¶a ¶aja a bajan nipikinkiwan maadińß ku ajnu tad…ômaw " pasu namakajdaaj i p…ôańßajtaw atu tunp…ôa kitidaan a aadińßan" maar~…ĺa ku n*b a tar~…ĺakaw nu tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan, itini i sipuor~…ĺija war~…ĺian a ud…ôkaj tad…ômaw idaw kuni ka adińßan, misas…ôŇči tu tunja tad…ômaw ńßina adińß i o ¶uo. **n*b . idaw ńß…ônaj ku duma a sasakamu…ôn tada tapaŇč nu ajnu tad…ômaw u p…ôasan a tajpinjuŇč nadaw a tad…ômaw, sakatur~…ĺu a nakamuan u kujasija tad…ômaw. (proto- ¶au ¶asoid). tu-s…ôp-tu- ¶aj mińß ¶aan idaw kunipar~…ĺutat…ônaan tuni kinkiwan, p…ôańßadaw s…ônw…ôn a tad…ômaw u oja tar~…ĺu amisan nu tu ¶u a tad…ômawan " mar~…ĺumanaj a zitajan nu ńß…ôd…ôkan nu tad…ômaw "t…ôrminar~…ĺ upp…ôr-par~…ĺ…ôor~…ĺitńßi ¶ p…ôopr~…ĺ…ô" atu kunjun nu ajawan ¶ajr~…ĺim-s…ôps…ôps…ôp mińß ¶aan namaka itiniaj a kitakidan katukuńß nu s…ônw…ôn z…ôn anikapur~…ĺuŇčan. **** "(t…ôrminar~…ĺ upp…ôr-par~…ĺ…ôor~…ĺitńßi ¶ p…ôopr~…ĺ…ô) .
S.FORM: Aynu binacadan " Aynu", amisan Dipun nu , timul nutipan nu E'luose a yuncumin binacadan, u Yaynu tademaw, Aynu tademaw, Aynu tademaw", tada aenengan nuheni i Paihaytaw, Ku'yedaw, Cendaw subal atu Kancaciw nu kitidaan. itini i Aynu nakamuan " Aynu" u " tademaw" han aimian, nina binacadan nikakenihan a kitidaan pangangan han Aynu-mawsi-li, nakamuan nu Ayun han " aenengan nu tademaw han". ". katukuh ayda, mangalay ku katuud nu Aynu a tademaw pangangan tu nuheni u " „ā¶„āŅ„É™" " nu Dipun a ngiha': Utari, kamu nu Aynu " cabay" a imian. Ťá≥šĽä, :Utari, ). i cudad nu siahu, "Aynu" atu "Utali" idaw ku tusaay nuheni a nganganan. milecad tu tademaw atu binacada, tatengaay a Aynu nu binacadan malawpes tu. . sausian nu siahu, tademaw makaala tu tulim-sepsepsep, caay kaw nu sihu ni sausian nu tademaw makaala tu tusa a bataan nu mangan. maka caywal-siwsiw mihcaan tulu a bulat tusa a demiad nipatinakuan " peahaydaw malumanay a nidiputan" nikudan, Aynu pacician minanam tu kamu nu Dipun, awnu Dipun ku ngangan, pasaluimengen ku lisin nu siza, mala niyaduay tu a tademaw. . nikalepacawan tu sakatusa a nikudan, sihuan nu Dipun hidan tu nuhini micukaymas " tawyaay a tademaw" hida satu mukamu, caay palutatengaen tina idaw nu binacadan sa. katukuh tu tusep-sepwal mihcaan enem a bulat enem a dimiad tawya ku Dipun palutatengan tuni ka idaw nu Aynu u yuncumin, tusep-caysiw mihcaan sepat a bulad caysiw demiad tawya tu siwantan. šļĆśąįŚĺĆ, . sakamusa ku Peahaydaw sihu pikinsaan nu cudadan itini i cay-siw-wal-sip a mihcaan, tawya Peahaydaw idaw ku tu-sip-lu-wal-cay a mangan nu Aynu tademaw. nika, katuuday nu Aynu a tademaw culimeken nuheni ku binacadan nuheni, atu caay kaw katinengan tu udip a tatapangan, sisa ayda hantu utiih a sausian ku tatengaay nu tademawan nu Aynu. E'luo-se tikuo itini i cay-wal-siw-pic mihcaan pikinsaan tu tademaw, idaw ku cay-sip-sip-nem a tademawan itida i E'luo-se musakamuay tu Aynu a nakamuan, itini i Ku'yedaw idaw ku cay-sip-lu-sip a tademawan. 1,434šļļ. picedekan atu zenla'sia kapulunga mikikiw kibetulay a sulit Aynu a tademaw "The Racial History of Man" "cay-siw-tu-lu mihcaan" Luolan. Puoleyci.Dkecen misulitay.ťėŅšľäŚä™šļļ"The Racial History of Man "(1923ŚĻī),ÁĺÖŤė≠¬∑šľĮťõ∑Ś•á¬∑ÁčĄŚÖčťĀúŤĎó. picidekan nu Aynu a tademaw lumeni' ku banges, apuyu' ku dais yadah ku ngisngis, ilabu ku mata, tanestes ku cihek, kapah ku udip, macebet ku bukes, kalalukutlukutan, wayway mahida u Kawsiwsuo a tademaw, bihit atu banuh nu udip kalasumasumanahan ku tademaw, katinengan nu kitakiday a tademaw sacebetay nu yadahay a banuhbanuhan nu tademaw. . Aynu a tademaw itini i likisaay a misulitay, micu misulitay atu mililiday misulitay kacinglawan nuheni. ayda hantu, mikinkiway a tademaw tulu ku sapatahekal tu Aynu nu tu lingatu a sasasuwalan. . nipikinkiwan ayda, ina misulitay a tademaw nai' henay ku wantan tunuhenian namakacuwaay hakiya sa. caysiw a seci cunci Ikuo zenlea siacia sipakayda i hekal nu waywayan patucek sa tunuhenian u Oluopa a daydayan kunuheni sa. namakayda i Sipuoliya makayda i Ku'yedaw katukuh i Dipun subalan. . nu aydaay a ciyenhetan-hesuan nipikinkiwan nai' maadih atu Oluopa tademaw nu sakalecad a milaliday " nuheni idaw atu Cuncu, Antaman nu sakalecad a lalidan", ayda nu lisenti masacacaya a bayan nipikinkiwan maadih ku Aynu tademaw " pasu namakaydaay i peahaytaw atu tunpea kitidaan a aadihan" maala ku N9b a talakaw nu tatengilan, itini i Sipuoliya walian a Udekay tademaw idaw kuni ka adihan, misasengi tu Tunya tademaw hina adih i Ocuo. śĒúŚł∂N9b . idaw henay ku duma a sasakamuen tada tapang nu Aynu tademaw u peasan a Taypinyung nadaw a tademaw, sakatulu a nakamuan u kuyasiya tademaw. (Proto-Caucasoid). tu-sep-tu-cay mihcaan idaw kunipalutatenaan tuni kinkiwan, peahadaw Senwen a tademaw u Oya talu amisan nu tucu a tademawan " malumanay a zitayan nu hedekan nu tademaw "Terminal Upper-Paleolithic people" atu kunyun nu ayawan caylim-sepsepsep mihcaan namaka itiniay a kitakidan katukuh nu senwen zen anikapulungan. 2021 "(Terminal Upper-Paleolithic people) .

ir~…ĺabu ku mata, tan…ôst…ôs ku ¶ińß…ôk, kapańß ku udip, ma ¶…ôb…ôt ku buk…ôs, kar~…ĺar~…ĺukutr~…ĺukutan, wajwaj mańßida u kawsiwsuo a tad…ômaw, bińßit atu banuńß nu udip kar~…ĺasumasumanańßan ku tad…ômaw, katin…ôŇčan nu kitakidaj a tad…ômaw sa ¶…ôb…ôtaj nu jadańßaj a banuńßbanuńßan nu tad…ômaw. . ajnu a tad…ômaw itini i r~…ĺikisaaj a misur~…ĺitaj, mi ¶u misur~…ĺitaj atu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj misur~…ĺitaj ka ¶iŇčr~…ĺawan nuńß…ôni. ajda ńßantu, mikinkiwaj a tad…ômaw tur~…ĺu ku sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ajnu nu tu r~…ĺiŇčatu a sasasuwar~…ĺan. . nipikinkiwan ajda, ina misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku wantan tunuńß…ônian namaka ¶uwaaj ńßakija sa. ¶ajsiw a s…ô ¶i ¶un ¶i ikuo z…ônr~…ĺ…ôa sia ¶ia sipakajda i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu wajwajan patu ¶…ôk sa tunuńß…ônian u or~…ĺuopa a dajdajan kunuńß…ôni sa. namakajda i sipuor~…ĺija makajda i ku Ē~ °j…ôdaw katukuńß i dipun subar~…ĺan. . nu ajdaaj a ¶ij…ônńß…ôtan-ńß…ôsuan nipikinkiwan nai Ē~ ° maadińß atu or~…ĺuopa tad…ômaw nu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mir~…ĺar~…ĺidaj " nuńß…ôni idaw atu ¶un ¶u, antaman nu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a r~…ĺar~…ĺidan", ajda nu r~…ĺis…ônti masa ¶a ¶aja a bajan nipikinkiwan maadińß ku ajnu tad…ômaw " pasu namakajdaaj i p…ôańßajtaw atu tunp…ôa kitidaan a aadińßan" maar~…ĺa ku n*b a tar~…ĺakaw nu tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan, itini i sipuor~…ĺija war~…ĺian a ud…ôkaj tad…ômaw idaw kuni ka adińßan, misas…ôŇči tu tunja tad…ômaw ńßina adińß i o ¶uo. **n*b . idaw ńß…ônaj ku duma a sasakamu…ôn tada tapaŇč nu ajnu tad…ômaw u p…ôasan a tajpinjuŇč nadaw a tad…ômaw, sakatur~…ĺu a nakamuan u kujasija tad…ômaw. (proto- ¶au ¶asoid). tu-s…ôp-tu- ¶aj mińß ¶aan idaw kunipar~…ĺutat…ônaan tuni kinkiwan, p…ôańßadaw s…ônw…ôn a tad…ômaw u oja tar~…ĺu amisan nu tu ¶u a tad…ômawan " mar~…ĺumanaj a zitajan nu ńß…ôd…ôkan nu tad…ômaw "t…ôrminar~…ĺ upp…ôr-par~…ĺ…ôor~…ĺitńßi ¶ p…ôopr~…ĺ…ô" atu kunjun nu ajawan ¶ajr~…ĺim-s…ôps…ôps…ôp mińß ¶aan namaka itiniaj a kitakidan katukuńß nu s…ônw…ôn z…ôn anikapur~…ĺuŇčan. **** "(t…ôrminar~…ĺ upp…ôr-par~…ĺ…ôor~…ĺitńßi ¶ p…ôopr~…ĺ…ô) .
